segments.text: Record the lead vocal first, then double it and pan the two copies hard left and right.
Stack three harmonies a third above the lead and high-pass them around 200 hz.
Add a short reverb on the adlibs and automate the delay throws on the last word of each line.
Compress the vocal bus gently with a 3 to 1 ratio and boost a little air at 12 khz.
